features: [GREAT SIZE] Say hello to compact convenience! Our purses boasts dimensions of approximately 10cm in height, 13cm in width, and 3.5cm in depth - perfectly sized for travel or everyday use. This sleek design fits seamlessly into your lifestyle without taking up too much space. Bring it with you on-the-go and enjoy the benefits of its small yet mighty size."

{EASY TO CLEAN] Easy-to-clean purse! Whether you’re heading to a business meeting, running errands, or going out with friends, this purse is the perfect accessory for any occasion. Its lightweight design and easy-clean PU Leather material makes it great for everyday use. Just gently wipe the purse with water to keep it looking brand new!
[PU LEATHER MATERIAL]This Purse is made of high-quality Pu leather, making it a timeless and sophisticated accessory
[FUNCTIONAL DESIGN] This small wallet is the perfect size for everyday use! With 6 card slots, 1 cash slot, 1 zipper coin pocket, and 1 ID window, you can easily store all your essentials.

[STYLISH] Take your wardrobe from day to night with this versatile purse! This stylish accessory is perfect for any occasion, and its ability to be worn as a clutch makes it the perfect companion for any outfit. With its sleek design and luxurious materials, this bag is sure to make you look and feel like a fashionista
description: Product Description Stylish OWL Purse OWL Wallet PU Leather Card Holder Organizer Small Cute Coin Purse British Designed OWL purse Fold-over design Roomly compartment Portable Purse. Can be easily put into your pocket and handbags. Perfect for someone who has multiple cards x High quality metal snap There are 12 slots to slide in your cards and two card windows. The two side compartments well secure your phone and cash under one zipper. The wallet has a compact design that eases the way you organize all your valuables. The contrasting stitches highlight its sophistication, while its snap button boosts both its style and charm. Stylish Embroidered owl design Original designed and Developed by Kukubird studios. It's perfect for you owl lovers that want to change up your day-to-day style. It is one of the most special gifts for Birthdays, Anniversaries, Such as Mother's Day, Christmas and other Special Occasions.
